LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Dominion_Desc: Consumes one dominion sigil and uses the full circle lattice to bootstrap the Crowned Gate crisis core. Package 4 now unfolds the full Gate-core phase after anchorfall: once the anchor lattice is destroyed, the breach manifests a central Crowned Gate that must be broken before dominion convergence completes.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Dominion_Rewards: • Initializes the endgame crisis framework in-world • Drives recurring hostile pulses while the anchor lattice survives • Unfolds a real Crowned Gate core that enters play after anchors are broken and must be destroyed to finish the package
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Dominion_SideEffects: • Requires full stabilizer coverage and both capacitor bays online • Blocks other abyssal encounters while the crisis core is active • After anchors fall, the Crowned Gate begins direct suppression, ignition strikes, and reinforcement pulses until it is destroyed or the breach stabilizes
LanguageData.ABY_CircleConsoleSubtitleDominion: Dominion crisis core active. Current state: {0}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionRitualMeta: Sigils on map: {0} • Crisis state: {1} • Challenge tier: endgame
LanguageData.ABY_DominionRitualMetaActive: Sigils on map: {0} • Crisis state: {1} • Anchors: {2} • Wave ETA: {3}
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisConfirmAbort: Abort the dominion crisis core on this map? This ends the current staging window and marks the run as cancelled.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisStartDesc: {0} has entered first-stage dominion synchronization. The breach core is unstable but not yet fully unfolded.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisAnchorfallDesc: {0} has progressed into anchorfall. {1} dominion anchors have materialized across the map, recurring abyssal pulses are now routing through them, and the breach will intensify until the anchors are destroyed.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisStandbyDesc: {0} is now holding a live dominion standby state. Later crisis packages will turn this into the full multi-phase encounter; for now the colony is sustaining the armed core.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisCancelledDesc: The dominion crisis core was intentionally shut down. Outcome: {0}
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisCompletedDesc: The anchor lattice was broken, the Crowned Gate manifested, and the gate core was destroyed before dominion convergence completed. Outcome: {0}
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisCompletedReason: Crowned Gate core destroyed before dominion convergence completed
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFailedDesc: The dominion crisis core destabilized before the later packages could take over. Failure reason: {0}
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisReminderAnchors: {0} / {1} dominion anchors remain active. Collapse window in {2}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_NoCircle: No valid summoning circle is available for dominion synchronization.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_AlreadyActive: A dominion crisis core is already active on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_NoResearch: Dominion gate bootstrapping has not been researched yet.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_Stabilizers: Dominion staging requires a full stabilizer ring. Installed: {0} / {1}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_Capacitors: Dominion staging requires both capacitor bays online. Installed: {0} / {1}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_CircleLost: The source summoning circle was lost.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_Power: The source summoning circle lost power for too long.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_WindowExpired: The package-1 dominion standby window expired.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_AnchorsPersisted: The dominion anchors were not destroyed before the collapse timer expired.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_NoAnchorCell: No valid map cells were available for the dominion anchors.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_AnchorRemnants: The map still contains {0} active dominion anchors from an unfinished breach.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisAbortFail_NoActive: No dominion crisis core is active on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisStatusLine_Anchors: Dominion crisis: {0} • anchors {1}/{2} • next wave {3} • {4} remaining
LanguageData.ABY_DominionAnchorPreviewSummaryIdle: No dominion anchors are active on this map yet. Once synchronization completes, anchorfall will seed multiple objectives around the colony.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionAnchor_ConsoleIdle: No anchor roles are active yet. The breach is still synchronizing.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionAnchor_ConsoleCleared: All known anchor roles on this map have been neutralized.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionAnchor_Effect_Suppression: lashes nearby player turrets with EMP pressure
LanguageData.ABY_DominionAnchor_Effect_Drain: bleeds nearby powered infrastructure and adds contamination
LanguageData.ABY_DominionAnchor_Effect_Breach: accelerates collapse timing and pushes extra contamination
LanguageData.ABY_DominionWavePulseDesc: Anchorfall is now routing recurring hostile pulses through the breach lattice. First pulse: {0}. Next pulse in roughly {1}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionWavePulseMessage: Dominion pulse routed: {0}. Next pulse in roughly {1}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionWavePreviewSummaryIdle: No hostile pulses are routing yet. Once anchorfall begins, the breach will start sending recurring waves through the active lattice.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionWavePreviewStatus_ThrottledU: throttled while earlier abyssal hostiles are still active
LanguageData.ABY_DominionWavePreviewStatus_ThrottledP: waiting for earlier breach portals to collapse
LanguageData.ABY_DominionWaveConsoleIdle: Wave routing remains dormant until anchorfall begins.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionRitualMetaGate: Sigils on map: {0} • Crisis state: {1} • Gate integrity: {2} • Next surge: {3}
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisGateDesc: {0} has torn the breach fully open. The anchor lattice is gone, but a hostile Crowned Gate has manifested near the ritual site. Destroy it before dominion convergence completes.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisReminderGate: Crowned Gate integrity: {0}. Next surge: {1}. Collapse window in {2}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_NoGateCell: No valid cells were available for the Crowned Gate core to manifest.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_GatePersisted: The Crowned Gate remained active until dominion convergence completed.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisStatusLine_Gate: Dominion crisis: {0} • gate {1} • next surge {2} • {3} remaining
LanguageData.ABY_DominionAnchorPreviewSummaryGate: Anchor state: broken. Crowned Gate state: {0}. Integrity: {1}. Collapse window: {2}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionAnchor_ConsoleGatecore: The anchor lattice has been broken. The breach is now feeding directly into a manifested Crowned Gate core.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionWavePreviewSummaryGate: Support pulses are now routed by the Crowned Gate. Pattern: {0}. Next surge: {1}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionWaveConsoleGatecore: Wave routing is now slaved directly to the Crowned Gate core.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionGatePreviewSummary: Gate state: {0}. Integrity: {1}. Next surge: {2}. Collapse window: {3}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionGatePreviewSummaryIdle: No manifested Crowned Gate is active yet. Once the anchor lattice is broken, the breach will condense into a central gate-core objective.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionGate_ConsoleIdle: No manifested Crowned Gate is active on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionGateCall_Message: Crowned Gate surge routed: {0}. Next surge in roughly {1}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionOpsObjective_Dormant: No active dominion breach on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionOpsObjective_Sync: Keep the source circle online until anchorfall manifests.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionOpsObjective_Anchors: Break the anchor lattice before the collapse window expires.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionOpsObjective_Gate: Destroy the Crowned Gate core before dominion convergence completes.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionOpsDirective_Sync: Keep the circle powered, unobstructed, and ready for the first anchorfall transition.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCommand_NoObjective: No dominion objective is currently available on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCompactHint: Dominion crisis telemetry is being routed through the circle.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCompactFooter: Dominion breach active. Use the full console for anchor and gate tracking.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionRitualMetaCooldown: Sigils on map: {0} • Crisis state: {1} • Rearm: {2} • Record: {3}
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCompactHintCooldown: Dominion lattice recovery in progress. Rearm available in {0}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionCrisisFail_Cooldown: Dominion lattice recovery is still in progress. Rearm available in {0}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionReplay_Empty: no dominion runs recorded on this map
LanguageData.ABY_DominionRewardPreviewSummaryIdle: Dominion reward routing is dormant until the breach is attempted on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionRewardConsoleIdle: No dominion breach data has been recorded on this map yet.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionOutcome_FailedSummary: Backlash routed a breach leak, scorched nearby infrastructure, and forced a cooldown window.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionOutcome_FailedSummarySoft: Backlash scorched nearby infrastructure, raised contamination, and forced a cooldown window.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionOutcome_CancelledSummary: The breach was damped early, but the lattice still needs time to cool and purge contamination.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionOpsObjective_Rearm: Prepare the lattice for another dominion breach.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionMaintenance_Combined: collapsed {0} excess portals and deferred the next pulse by {1}
